eq: a g and a b are pronounced together with the b being ‘sucked in’ (implosive)
eq_dg: Arufu za Chidigo ambazo g na b zinaungana phamwenga, b inajumizwa.
Kuanguka photsi kula phatu pha dzulu.
Kuika chitu dzulu ya chitu chanjina kpwa kuchitundika.
Kuhendza chitu chianguke photsi.
Nguo kukala ngumu bada ya kuanikpwa dzuwani, kukaza.
Paka wa chilume.
Mvula kunyesha kpwa wingi sana, kpwa nguvu kulu.
Kuvundza chitu kpwa nguvu, kutobola.
Kupapura ngozi ya mutu kpwa kucha, kukuna kpwa nguvu.
Angaliya girigza.
Nyama wa tsakani anayefwanana na nguruwe ela ana meno makulu.
Kumuvamia mutu kpwa nguvu, kumshambulia.
Basikili inayohendwa kpwa mihi ni ana, ya kuchezera.
Aina ya muhogo.

eq: clang (sound of something metal being dropped)
eq_dg: Sauti ya chuma ichianguka ama ichipigbwa.
Sauti ya kurasharasha, kama chuma chichiokpwaruzana.

eq: fall down before someone, to prostrate oneself
eq_dg: Kuanguka mbere za mutu, kugbwa photsi kpwa kumuabudu ama kumuomba.

eq: food that cannot be chewed because it contains grit
eq_sw: chakula ambacho hakiliki kwa sababu kimechafuka kwa mchanga
eq_dg: Chakurya ambacho china mtsanga ndani na tachiweza kuriwa vinono.
Kugombana na atu anjina, kukpwaruzana.
Kukala bila sauti yoyosi, kukala tulivu.
Muhogo mkpwulu wa kuriwa.
Kufunga na kufungula matso kpwa haraka, kupesa.
Kushika chitu kpwa mkpwono, kuhala chitu.

eq: join together, to be joined together
eq_dg: Vitu viiri ama zaidi kuungana phamwenga, kushikamana.
Kupha mutu chitu, kumuikira chitu mkpwononi.
Kuunganisha vitu phamwenga, kuika vitu vikale chimwenga.

eq: sound of a wave crashing on a beach or rock
eq_sw: sauti ya wimbi linalopiga ufuwoni au jabalini
eq_dg: Sauti ya maimbi ganapopiga maweni ama ufukoni.
